name: Gazpacho Blond
recipeIngredient: 2 cloves peeled garlic, boiled for 5 minutes
1 pound yellow bell peppers, peeled with a vegetable peeler
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
8 small oil cured olives, pitted and cut into slivers
1 ripe red tomato, seeded and cut into dice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the garlic, yellow tomatoes, and bell peppers.
2. Puree and thin with olive oil, champagne vinegar to taste, and some water if too thick. Season well to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Seed the squash and cut into 1/4-inch dice. Cut the bread into 1/2-inch dice, drizzle with olive oil, salt, and pepper, and bake in a 400-degree oven for about 10 minutes or until somewhat crisp and brown.
4. Ladle soup into chilled soup bowls; garnish with squash and croutons, and center some red tomatoes and black olives in each portion if desired.
Yield: 4 servings
